items.description:
TLDR: we mea­sure AIs’ ex­pres­sions of plea­sure and pain, find­ing con­sis­tent and sur­pris­ing prefer­ences.

AIs dis­play be­hav­iors that mimic hu­man emo­tions, such as at­tempt­ing to de­bug code and say­ing “EUREKA!” or “I am a failure…” At the Cen­ter f...

items.title: The Weakest Model in the Selector
items.description: A chain is only as strong un­der ten­sion as its weak­est link, and an AI chat sys­tem is, un­der nor­mal de­sign choices, as se­cure as the weak­est model in the se­lec­tor. While this is rel­a­tively easy to miti­gate, An­thropic is the only chat ser­vice I know of that ac­tu­ally pre­vents ...

items.description: One of the main com­plaints I heard about the Inkaven Res­i­dency is that it put too much pres­sure on peo­ple to write too quickly. The fel­low­ship was based on the premise that peo­ple who pub­lish ev­ery day have his­tor­i­cally...
